name: Swiftmarch

passives.name: Noxian Fervor
passives.effects: Gain {{tip|adaptive force}} equal to {{as|5% of your '''total''' movement speed}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain adaptive force equal to 5% of total movement speed.

simpleDescription: Improves defense and reduces duration of disabling effects

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Fleetfooted and Noxian Fervor are continuous passives while equipped (no activation).
Execution model: Noxian Fervor adaptive force should dynamically recalculate from current total movement speed as movement modifiers change.
Player-visible behavior: this item is role-quest gated and upgrades from Boots of Swiftness in Summoner's Rift.
